title: Colour athletics day at York High School
bodyText:
Gallery
                            Video

GEORGE NEWS AND VIDEOS - ‘A million dreams’, York High’s theme for the year, manifested in colour at the colour athletics day on Eden THS’s sports fields this morning.


> The excitement is reaching extreme proportions as the teams compete on the tracks and their supporters on the pavillion.


Stuart, Windsor, Lancaster, and Tudor are the colour houses. The various colour houses competed with their grand entries but Tudor made a fierce entry with a Fire truck.


> VIDEO: Tudor's fierce entry. Michelle Pienaar


Your browser does not support HTML5 video.


> VIDEO: The colour houses showing their team spirit. Video: Michelle Pienaar


Your browser does not support HTML5 video.

Leaders cheering their team on. Photos: Michelle Pienaar

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
